title: Override Management
subtitle: Manage custom DNS, rules, rule providers and override scripts

dialog.scriptCreateDesc: Script must define a main function that receives a config object and returns the modified result
dialog.templatePlaceholder: Select a template or enter manually
dialog.scriptTemplatePlaceholder: Select a template to fill content
dialog.contentHint: Ensure content is valid YAML format
dialog.scriptContentHint: Script must define a main function that receives a config object and returns the modified result

deleteConfirm.title: Confirm Delete
deleteConfirm.description: This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this override?

ruleProviderConfirm.title: Create Rule Config
ruleProviderConfirm.description: A rule provider template was detected. Create the corresponding rule config as well?
ruleProviderConfirm.descriptionDetail: The rule config will be appended to existing rules. Duplicate rules will be automatically removed (case-insensitive).

editor.title: Custom Rules
editor.description: Add custom routing rules, supporting domain, IP, protocol and other matching methods
editor.emptyHint: No custom rules yet, click the button below to add
editor.helpOutbound: Outbound Name: required, creates corresponding policy group
editor.helpGeosite: GeoSite: match domain sets using GeoSite database
editor.helpDomainSuffix: Domain Suffix: match full domain suffix, e.g., google.com
editor.helpDomainKeyword: Domain Keyword: match keywords contained in domain
editor.helpGeoip: GeoIP: match IP address country/region using GeoIP database

toast.createdWithGroups: Custom rule created. Added {{groups}} proxy groups with default nodes: 🚀 Node Select, DIRECT. Edit subscription to modify.
toast.updatedWithGroups: Custom rule updated. Added {{groups}} proxy groups with default nodes: 🚀 Node Select, DIRECT. Edit subscription to modify.
toast.ruleProviderCreated: Rule provider and rule config created
toast.ruleProviderError: Error creating rule config, check console
